description: Expected results for DataValue quota exhausted test

expected_messages.description: Start with size above the quota - manager must respond Status_Offline with session=-1

validation_rules.session_consistency: Not applicable - session is never created when the quota check rejects the Start
validation_rules.message_order: Single Start message followed by its rejection
validation_rules.response_format: Status 2 = Status_Offline; session is UINT64_MAX (-1) because no session was created
